title: Black Brighton Market Festival Day
description: The third Brighton Fringe edition of the popular Black Brighton Pop Up Market bringing you an exciting family-friendly day festival featuring a vibrant array of arts & craft stalls, performances, storytelling, workshops, and a cultural café - something for everyone! Addressing some of the limited opportunities for Black People/People of Colour, the pioneering Black Brighton Market venture creates a unique space for more communities have the chance to sell their art, goods and services, and to also showcase taster sessions, workshops and performances to the wider general public in the state-of-the-art Ironworks Studios. More details available on the Black Brighton Market website. All are welcome. THIS EVENT IS SPONSORED BY THE IRENE MENSAH BURSARY & FLO CREATIVE IN COLLABORATION WITH IRONWORKS STUDIOS AND THE ENTANGLED COORDINATES CO-CREATED THEATRE PRODUCTION ‘THIS IS NEW BRIGHTON’
